channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: 这是我的全新 Hugo 网站

item.title: SpringBoot
item.author: Author
item.description: SpringBoot @Configuration 组件添加 源码重点： postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry 每个registryId唯一 调用processConfigBeanDefinitions将registry中Bean

item.title: Docker
item.author: Author
item.description: Docker and MySQL 开源应用容器引擎： 将软件编译成镜像，做好配置后发布，保证启动快速。 启动快 占用资源少 体积小 docker主机(Host)：安装了Docke

item.title: First_post
item.author: Author
item.description: Hi this is the first post of mine. From now on, my personal working and studying process will be posted here.
